fixture: 070_scalar_numeric_functions

statement 1:
  sql:
    SELECT
      ABS(-12.5) AS abs_decimal,
      CEIL(1.2) AS ceil_decimal,
      FLOOR(1.8) AS floor_decimal,
      ROUND(12.345, 2) AS round_decimal,
      TRUNCATE(12.345, 2) AS truncate_decimal,
      MOD(10, 3) AS mod_integer,
      SIGN(-12.5) AS sign_decimal,
      GREATEST(1.5, 2.5, 0.5) AS greatest_decimal,
      LEAST(1.5, 2.5, 0.5) AS least_decimal
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] abs_decimal NUMERIC(3,1) NOT NULL
      [1] ceil_decimal NUMERIC(2,1) NOT NULL
      [2] floor_decimal NUMERIC(2,1) NOT NULL
      [3] round_decimal NUMERIC(5,3) NOT NULL
      [4] truncate_decimal NUMERIC(5,3) NOT NULL
      [5] mod_integer INTEGER NOT NULL
      [6] sign_decimal NUMERIC(3,1) NOT NULL
      [7] greatest_decimal NUMERIC(2,1) NOT NULL
      [8] least_decimal NUMERIC(2,1) NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] "12.5" | "2" | "1" | "12.35" | "12.34" | 1 | "-1" | "2.5" | "0.5"

statement 2:
  sql:
    SELECT
      POWER(2, 3) AS power_result,
      SQRT(9) AS sqrt_result,
      EXP(0) AS exp_result,
      LN(1) AS ln_result,
      LOG(10, 100) AS log_result,
      LOG10(1000) AS log10_result,
      SIN(0) AS sin_result,
      COS(0) AS cos_result,
      TAN(0) AS tan_result,
      ASIN(0) AS asin_result,
      ACOS(1) AS acos_result,
      ATAN(1) AS atan_result,
      ATAN2(1, 1) AS atan2_result
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] power_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [1] sqrt_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [2] exp_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [3] ln_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [4] log_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [5] log10_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [6] sin_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [7] cos_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [8] tan_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [9] asin_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [10] acos_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [11] atan_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
      [12] atan2_result DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 8 | 3 | 1 | 0 | 2 | 3 | 0 | 1 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0.7853981633974483 | 0.7853981633974483
